title: Software Update - DFU - Headset at low battery - Software update tab in device settings
scenario: DFU update is blocked with a pop-up when headset battery is below 5%, and only proceeds when the headset is plugged into power.
steps: Ensure headset battery is below 5% and not plugged into power.
Navigate to the software update tab.
Attempt to start a DFU update.
Attempt to start the DFU update again.
While the update is in progress, unplug the headset from power (while battery remains below 5%).
Observe the pop-up message reappears and blocks the update.
expected: When battery is below 5% and headset is not plugged in, attempting a DFU update shows a pop-up: "Update currently not available, please try back later". The update proceeds only when the headset is plugged into power. If unplugged during the update (while still below 5%), the pop-up reappears and blocks the update.
